nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 5am. Partly cloudy, with a low around 78. North wind around 1 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms after 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 91. Heat index values as high as 103. South wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 10pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 78. Southeast wind 1 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after noon. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Heat index values as high as 105. Southeast wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Partly cloudy, with a low around 79. Southeast wind 1 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Southeast wind 1 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 8pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 80. Southeast wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Southeast wind 2 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 80. Southeast wind 5 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly clear, with a low around 80. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Sunny, with a high near 92. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly clear, with a low around 80. Chance of precipitation is 50%.
